network_summary: Three ACDI LLCs (ACDI GLENVIEW LLC, ACDI-NAPERVILLE LLC, ACDI CHICAGO LLC) operating under the brand 'A Center for Dental Implants' across Oak Brook/Glenview (60523), Naperville (60540), and Chicago (60611). Founded by Dr. James D'Alise who owned ACDI from 2005 until July 2018 when his IL dental license was revoked; he was convicted in 2021 of 7 counts of unlicensed practice of dentistry (People v. D'Alise, 2022 IL App (2d) 210541). Zuzana Vitkova is CFO across all three NPI records. No MSO, DSO platform, or PE backer found. Private group practice under a shared brand and financial officer. NPI records last updated August 2009 — high stale probability; at least the old Oak Brook address (1301 W 22nd St) confirmed closed; a Glenview location at 2501 Compass Rd (the ACDI GLENVIEW LLC mailing address) appears active as of April 2026 per Yelp.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. James V. D'Alise DDS (founder, majority owner 2005-2018+, license revoked July 2018, convicted 2021); Zuzana Vitkova, Chief Financial Officer (NPPES AO on all three entities)
durable_artifacts: NPPES AO 'Zuzana Vitkova, Chief Financial Officer' on NPI 1356578140, 1780850131, and 1235305681 — identical title and name across three distinct ZIPs (60523, 60540, 60611)
Name chain 'ACDI' prefix across all three legal entities: ACDI GLENVIEW LLC, ACDI-NAPERVILLE LLC, ACDI CHICAGO LLC
Official brand website acenterfordentalimplants.com confirmed in search results; mailing address for ACDI GLENVIEW LLC is 2501 Compass Rd Ste 130 Glenview IL 60268 per NPPES API
All three NPIs share taxonomy 1223G0001X (General Dentistry) and NPPES status = Active
People v. D'Alise, 2022 IL App (2d) 210541: court confirms D'Alise was 'majority owner of ACDI' from 2005 to July 2018 and remained majority owner post-revocation as office manager
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: CRITICAL STALENESS FLAG: All three NPI records were last updated August 2009 per NPPES. Dr. D'Alise's license was revoked 2018 and he was criminally convicted 2021 — the original Oak Brook 1301 W 22nd St address is confirmed closed per ABC7 (Nov 2019). The NPPES location address for ACDI GLENVIEW LLC is 2000 Spring Rd Ste 600 Oak Brook (a different address from 1301 W 22nd St); the Glenview mailing address (2501 Compass Rd) appears in an April 2026 Yelp update suggesting possible continued operation there. The Naperville location (provider_count=0) and Chicago location (last updated 2009) are high-probability stale shells. The downstream validator should verify whether any ACDI location is currently operating under a licensed dentist before counting any of these as active corporate GP locations.
evidence_chain: AO signal: NPPES shows Zuzana Vitkova as CFO on 3 distinct NPI-2 orgs across ZIPs 60523, 60540, 60611, all with 'ACDI' prefix in the legal entity name. Documentary corroboration: (1) Official brand website acenterfordentalimplants.com confirmed via multiple search results linking the brand 'A Center for Dental Implants' to these LLC entities; (2) Court case People v. D'Alise (2022 IL App 2d 210541) confirms ACDI is a real private dental group owned by Dr. James D'Alise; (3) Yelp listing updated April 2026 for 'A Center for Dental Implants' at 2501 Compass Rd Glenview (= ACDI GLENVIEW LLC mailing address). No MSO, PE, or management-services layer found — this is a dentist-founded private multi-location group. Significant staleness concern: NPI records last updated 2009; founder's license revoked 2018; confirmed location closure reported 2019.
future_app_notes: 1. Verify whether any ACDI location is currently operating under a new/replacement licensed dentist — the Glenview Yelp (April 2026) is the best current signal. 2. The website acenterfordentalimplants.com was connection-refused during this investigation (June 2026) — check again; if still down, treat network as stale/closed. 3. D'Alise was convicted and sentenced 2021 — check IDFPR for any current licensed dentist operating under ACDI. 4. Zuzana Vitkova's LinkedIn shows 'Project Manager at Razny Jewelers' — not a dental professional, consistent with administrative CFO role. 5. If any ACDI location is verified currently operating, it would be dentist_multi (no DSO/PE layer). If all locations confirmed closed, reclassify entire network as stale/closed false positive.

classifications.stale_closed_note: STALENESS WARNING: NPI last updated August 2009. The court record states D'Alise practiced in the 'south loop and central loop area of Chicago' from 1990-2012, consistent with a Chicago location. However, the ABC7 article (Nov 2019) says the Oak Brook practice was closed — the Chicago location status post-2018 revocation is unknown. The Yelp listing categorizes it as 'Periodontists' (a specialist category) — if the Chicago location was implant/periodontal specialist-focused rather than GP, it may not belong in the GP denominator. Validator should confirm: (1) whether 625 N Michigan Ave Ste 1710 is an operating dental office; (2) whether it is GP or specialist.
